title: Junior SEO Specialist at Fabindia Online

jsonLd.title: Junior SEO Specialist at Fabindia Online
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Fabindia Online! We are hiring a SEO Specialist for our Aurangabad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Fabindia Online:
Fabindia Online is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Fabindia Online!
